name: Tee Box Golf House
address: 137 Mountain View Rd, Hillsborough Township, NJ 08844
about: Tee Box Golf House is a golf simulator lounge located in Hillsborough, New Jersey, offering a space for all skill levels to play in perfect conditions, practice with Trackman-powered data, or relax with mini golf. The venue operates on a bay-hour pricing model, allowing up to 6 people per bay, and is situated inside Iron Peak Sports and Events, which provides additional amenities including a bar and restaurant. Booking is recommended to ensure the facility is open, with members able to book up to two weeks in advance and non-members up to one week.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate game tracking and data analysis
Spacious bays accommodating up to 6 players for group outings
On-site coaching available for game improvement
Part of a larger sports complex with full bar and restaurant

food_and_drink.notes: Food service available from Iron Peak Sports and Events' kitchen, starting at 12:30 pm on weekends and 5 pm on weekdays. Outside food is not permitted when the bar is open.
Full bar service available from Iron Peak Sports and Events, starting at 12:30 pm on weekends and 5 pm on weekdays.

simulator_hardware.notes: Purpose-built indoor golf simulator designed for the ultimate indoor golf experience.
Complete golf performance, improvement, and entertainment solution that is more than just a launch monitor.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While a few sets of clubs are available on a first-come, first-served basis, it is highly recommended that you bring your own set. The venue does not have enough clubs for all bays.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted when the on-site bar is open. Food service is available from the Iron Peak Sports and Events kitchen.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, it takes 1 hour per golfer to complete 18 holes. If there is one player, it will take 1 hour, but with 4 players, it is recommended to book 4 hours to ensure enough time to finish the round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue specifically states they do not have kids golf clubs and is not marketed as a family-friendly environment for children.
